value: Thank you for raising this concern. We take customer privacy and comfort seriously, and drivers shouldn't be lingering while you're unpacking—that's not how our service is meant to work. Could you let me know which delivery this was (approximate date and time, or order number if you have it) so we can look into what happened and speak with the driver involved? In the meantime, you're always welcome to ask drivers to wait outside or return once you've finished unpacking, and we'll make a note on your account if you'd prefer this going forward.
